[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Tola''' was a stoic [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who served as a commanding officer of the ''[[New Hope]]'' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

While in orbit over [[Milagro/Legends|Milagro]], the ship was [[Battle in the Milagro system|under attack]] by an [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] [[Imperial-class_Star_Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]. While they were waiting for reinforcements, Tola could do more than allocating the resources for repairs as the ''New Hope'' suffered damage.<ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref> He ordered to get the backup [[antenna/Legends|antenna]] online.<ref name="JK audio" /> [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] arrived to the [[Bridge_(starship)/Legends|bridge]] having interrupted a shower.<ref name="JK" /> and Tola informed her of the developments: the ship was holding course over Milagro, [[deflector shield/Legends|shields]] were down but the [[hull/Legends|hull]] was holding; the aggressor was somewhere in far side of the [[star system/Legends|star system]] out of [[sensor/Legends|scanner]] range and were trying to manage against smaller [[starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].<ref name="JK audio">[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]]</ref>

When [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'' arrived to the system, locating the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] and confirming it was damaged, [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] "ordered" Tola to inform [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and prepare to counterattack the Destroyer. Despite Mon Mothma being a civilian, Tola nonetheless complied.<ref name="JK" /> 

They were twenty thousand [[kilometer/Legends|clicks]] away from the Star Destroyer. Tola continued to coordinate the repairs. When gate twelve was depressurized, he ordered to divert more power to thruster nomber six. He tried to ensure Mothma and Leia that there were possibilities to win the battle if the Destroyer was damaged as expected. The Imparial Captain [[Purdy M. Trico]] prepared to engage them; knowing that both ships had no shields, he ordered his [[gunner/Legends|gunners]] to fire at will.<ref name="JK audio" />

No long after, Solo reported that the Star Destroyer's escort had changed formation and her [[deflector shield/Legends|shields]] were down. Mothma did not repeat her previous mistake and she, like all the crew, waited for Tola's decision, who conceded with Solo, and took the oportunity to engage the Imperial ship.<ref name="JK" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' Tola is mentioned to be a Calamari Captain. In the [[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|audio adaptation]] Tola was voiced by [[Stephen Yoakam]] and has a regular human voice.
